settings.heading: Ingredients
settings.body: Wild-caught Alaskan salmon (86%), sweet potato, chickpea flour, flaxseed, turmeric, mixed tocopherols (natural preservative). No grains, no fillers, no artificial anything.

settings.heading: Feeding guidelines
settings.body: Small dogs: 3–5 pieces/day. Medium: 5–8. Large: 8–12. As a treat, not a meal replacement. Always provide fresh water.

settings.heading: Shipping & returns
settings.body: Free US shipping on $50+. Ships within 24 hours. Not tail-wagging? Return unopened within 30 days for a full refund.

settings.heading: FAQ
settings.body: Q: Good for training? Yes! Small enough for rapid-fire rewards. Q: Allergies? Single protein, grain-free, hypoallergenic.

settings.name: Maya K.
settings.title: Biscuit is OBSESSED
settings.body: My beagle loses his mind the second he hears the bag crinkle. Used them for recall training and suddenly he has impeccable manners. A miracle.

settings.name: Dev R.
settings.title: The only treat that survived our picky pup
settings.body: We've tried a dozen premium treats and gotten bored side-eyes. These? Actual zoomies. The sweet potato makes them easy on her tummy too.

settings.name: Priya S.
settings.title: Great treats, wish the bag was bigger
settings.body: Quality is top-notch and Coco clearly loves them. My only complaint is they disappear too fast. Bring on the 2lb jar!

settings.name: Arjun P.
settings.title: Smell-test passed by all three dogs
settings.body: Three dogs, three different personalities, unanimous approval. Even my suspicious senior sniffed and immediately demanded more. Subscribed.

settings.subtext: Plus sneak peeks, new drops, and tail-wagging tips.
